description: Travel receipt threshold is present, but unrelated finance and internship content dilutes the retrieval set.
query: What is the receipt threshold in the Atlas travel policy?

retrieved_chunks.text: The Atlas travel policy requires itemized receipts for any expense above $25.
The quarterly market-risk bulletin summarizes commodity price swings and regional shipping exposure.
Intern applicants must provide a portfolio link and two references before the interview stage.

final_answer: The Atlas travel policy requires itemized receipts for any expense above $25.

entries.text: The Atlas travel policy requires itemized receipts for any expense above $25.
